lints.name: unindexed_foreign_keys
lints.title: Unindexed foreign keys
lints.description: Identifies foreign key constraints without a covering index.
lints.detail: Table `public.orders` has a foreign key `orders_customer_id_fkey` without a covering index.

lints.name: multiple_permissive_policies
lints.title: Multiple Permissive Policies
lints.description: Detects multiple permissive RLS policies for the same role and action.
lints.detail: Table `public.orders` has multiple permissive policies for role `authenticated` for action `SELECT`.
